skills.name: eidos-ecosystem
skills.description: Orientation map for the Eidos AGI pillars, standards, plugin stores, and skill hubs.

skills.name: eidos-skills-hub
skills.description: Search, inspect, cache, rank, install, and update skills across live, local, trusted, and Eidos sources.

skills.name: improve-skills-hub
skills.description: Propose evidence-backed, testable improvements to the Eidos Skills Hub ecosystem.

skills.name: maintain-codex-skills
skills.description: Audit and reconcile installed Codex skills against approved provenance-tracked snapshots.

skills.name: parallel-search-skill-libraries
skills.description: Search Skills.sh, Eidos, installed/local skills, trusted libraries, and GitHub concurrently.

skills.name: prefer-skill-candidates
skills.description: Rank skill candidates with explicit preferences, trust, blocking, evidence, and availability.
